rules.note: Provisional scaffold from a $10 per million input and $50 per million output baseline, with current Bedrock cache multipliers applied pending provider confirmation. Bedrock does not yet have a catalogued Claude Opus 4.8 pricing file in this repo, so this follows the same baseline used for the other mapped providers.
